title: Elemental Wings
description: A resource pack that adds various new wings
body:
adds some custom elytra. rename your elytra to match whichever pair you want. requires CIT or optifine to work properly.
![A Minecraft screenshot featuring eight custom wing textures against a white background. From left to right, the wings include: "Rainbow Wings", a pair that resemble bird wings with rainbow and white feathers; "Shadow Wings," a pair of wings that resembles a shadowy blob; "Fire Wings", a pair of wings made of fire; "Soul Fire Wings", a pair of wings made of soul fire; "Water Wings", a pair of wings made of water; "Mercury Wings", a pair of wings made of mercury; "Ice Wings", a pair of wings that resembles icicles; and "Missing Wings", a pair of wings with the magenta-and-black missing texture pattern.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6bc3eae56e8145bb968f5476e6030c51383d18f.png)

all textures are made by me using blockbench
